message:
test(core): property-based tests for error, accounts, api_schema modules

155 new proptest tests:
- proptest_error.rs (63 tests): serde roundtrip, remediation builder, Display, sub-errors
- proptest_accounts.rs (47 tests): selection, threshold, tie-break, parse_reset_at
- proptest_api_schema.rs (45 tests): version compat, schema registry, breaking changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
